-- 3 of 43 --

Scale, Longevity, & More Control
● You can scale singular campaigns up to $40,000 - $50,000 a day
and have them consistently hit KPI day after day for months.
● We’ve had winning creatives that have lasted for up to 16 months
at over $9 Million in spend
● Google gives you a lot more control over working campaigns,
where you can simply cut out low performing demographics such
as income, Male / Female, Married / Not Married, Age, etc..
ClientAccelerators.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 43 --

Way Friendler On Compliance
● As anyone who has run ads on Facebook for any significant time
has seen, you will get ad accounts disabled. Doesn’t matter how
compliant you are.
● We have never had ONE Google Ads account shut down
● We’re able to be a lot more aggressive with the proof we put in our
scripts & videos we roll out for clients = higher CTRs & conversion
rates

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

How To Scale Hard On YouTube
● Creative - Great Video Creative will solve a lot of your problems on
YouTube Ads right away
● Large Audience Targeting - If you want to go big on YouTube, you
need large audiences to go after, small placements and keywords
don’t work..
● Tracking & Data - Using the right tracking & analytics softwares can
make or break you on YouTube

-- 11 of 43 --

Metrics To Shoot For With Creative
● 1.25% CTR is solid - but will fall below the 1% mark when you
go to scale
● 2% is great and gives you some room to scale
● 2.5 - 3% - is really strong out of the gate and should give you
some serious legs to scale
● We like to see a 25% View Rate as well, but CTR is ultimately
more important
ClientAccelerators.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 43 --

How We Script Great Creatives For Our Clients
● Get Attention - You need to get attention RIGHT away in the first 3
seconds, if you do not, you’re going to get skipped
● Establish Credibility - You want to show people you’re someone to listen
to
● Call To Action - We usually do a screenshare of exactly where they’re
going to land and what to do - especially with Lead Gen / Webinar Funnels
● Testimonials/Proof - Show proof of customers that have had success with
the product
● Final CTA
ClientAccelerators.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 19 of 43 --

Make Variations of Winning Creatives
● Add an end screen with a 10 second countdown timer - people will watch
an ad all the way through, and then it will end - you want to give them 10
full seconds to click
● Add a new 5 second intro - we have done this with ‘Breaking News’
segments
● Add more testimonials at the end, you can simply add another 2-3
minutes of video testimonials from happy customers to keep a good
creative going
ClientAccelerators.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 20 of 43 --

Setting Up A Great Base To Start With YouTube Ads
● Google Tag Manager - Setup all of your tracking & conversions
● Hook up Google Analytics to your Google Ads account to pass through all of
the conversion data
● Setup your Goals in Google Analytics so you can see which Demographics &
Audiences are doing well
● Integrate your YouTube Account with Google Ads to retarget people who have
watched an ad / video from your channel
● Hyros for full end to end tracking ClientAccelerators.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 21 of 43 --

Google Tag Manager
● This will allow you to keep everything organized in one place
● Setup Google Conversion Linker to fire on all pages so it tracks
everything correctly
● Setup Google Analytics to fire on all pages
● Setup Conversions using GTM & Google Ads (Lead, Add To Cart,
Purchase, etc..)
ClientAccelerators.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 22 of 43 --

Setup Your Custom Columns
After you setup your conversions in Google, you will need to create the custom
columns in your Google Ads dashboard so you can see those conversions

-- 23 of 43 --

Setting Up Your Goals in Google Analytics &
Analyzing Data
● Go to your Google Analytics, Go to bottom left, click
Admin, then go all the way to the right and click on
Goals.
● Setup your goals based upon what someone would do
in your funnel, so if they if it’s a lead gen page, that
leads to sales letter, you would setup 3 goals.
○ Lead
○ Add To Cart
○ Purchase
ClientAccelerators.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 24 of 43 --

Using GA To Test Winning Audiences
● When your goals are setup correctly, you can go to the audiences section of
Google Analytics, go to ‘Interests’ and you can now see a bunch of audiences
that are most likely to convert for your offer
● We use this all the time to find In-Market & Affinity Audiences that are likely to
convert according to Google
● We have a client in the weight loss space that sells a $5k consulting offer, we
used GA to find the audience ‘Home & Decor’ that has absolutely crushed it
for us
ClientAccelerators.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Best Tracking Period.
● We use Hyros internally and for 95% of our
clients
● It fully integrates into Google & Facebook Ads
so you can see your actual ROI without having
to deal with manually entering data
● Tracks over 6 different ways, IP, email, phone,
biometrics, click ID, etc..
● Fully integrates into your CRM so you can have
someone optin as a lead today, then 5 months
later book a call, become a sale and it will show
the ROI from the original ad

-- 27 of 43 --

3-5 Different Intro Angles On Initial Roll Out
● Proof angle - We layer on tons of proof into this video, one of our top
creatives we’re running right now opens up with around 40 checks on a pool
table with close to $2 Million Dollars in Commissions
● Story Based - Open up with a story about your product or service, hook the
prospect quickly, then layer on the proof and CTAs
● Intrigue - You can put together a blinder angle, that’s shorter 45 seconds to 1
minute, pre-selling them on some amazing new discovery about your product
or service (We currently have a client’s creative crushing with this angle)
ClientAccelerators.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 28 of 43 --

Initial Roll-Out
● In-Market Audiences - 50% of Budget
● Keyword Campaigns - 20% of Budget
● Custom Intent - 20% of Budget
● Remarketing - 10% of Budget
● Maximize Conversions if your Ads Account doesn’t have any Data
ClientAccelerators.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 29 of 43 --

Campaign Settings
● New Accounts we choose ‘Leads’ or ‘Sales’ and optimize for ‘Maximize
Conversions’
● Choose ‘YouTube Videos’ under the Networks Section
● For Ad Groups you will split them out into Desktop, Mobile, & Tablet
● Test 3-4 Video Creatives For Across Each Ad Group
ClientAccelerators.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 30 of 43 --

Types of Bidding
● Maximize Conversions - We roll this out for brand new campaigns to start
to get data and feed Google’s Algorithm, after 50 - 75 conversions, we
launch Target CPA Campaigns 90% of the time
● Cost Per View - We use this maybe 3-5% of the time, as it’s not taking
advantage of Google’s Algorithm, and generally does poorly
● Target CPA - This is the best type of bidding we’ve found after 50 - 75
Conversions. You can also lower the Target CPA as the campaign
regulates
ClientAccelerators.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 31 of 43 --

In-Market Campaign
● Google knows who is in the market for certain products, services, etc..
● These people are actively researching on Google Search & YouTube
● Example would be targeting people who are actively researching
‘Advertising & Marketing Services’
● These audiences do very well for us out of the gate for new accounts,
so we like to roll them out first
ClientAccelerators.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 32 of 43 --

Keyword Campaigns
● Use TubeSift.com to find 75 - 150 relevant keywords for your niche
● If you’re doing Lead Gen, just optimize based upon a rule of 3X CPA, so if
you’re looking for leads for $10, let a keyword run to $30 in spend, and if
it’s hitting target CPA, keep running, if not, pause it.
● If you’re doing a $47 - $97 product, you’re not going to want to wait that
long on 3X Target CPA for purchases, so you could move the optimization
up the funnel. This might mean 3X Target CPA of Add To Carts
ClientAccelerators.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 33 of 43 --

Custom Intent Campaign
● Take 10-30 keywords / websites and build a custom intent audience in
Google
● Build out themes for each
○ Affiliate Marketing
○ Search Engine Optimization
○ How To Make Money Online
ClientAccelerators.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 34 of 43 --

Remarketing On YouTube Ads
● Viewed Any Ad From A Channel - 30, 60, 90, 120, 180, 365, 540 Days
● Viewed Any Video From A Channel - 30, 60, 90, 120, 180, 365, 540
Days
● All Website Visitors - 30, 60, 90, 120, 180, 365, 540 Days
● You can launch each one of these as their own campaign with all the
different recency segments in each. If one is not hitting KPI simply
turn it off.
ClientAccelerators.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 35 of 43 --

Optimizing Campaigns
● We have 3X Target CPA rule for ad groups that allow us to turn off
things based upon hard data and not emotion
● If you’re looking for sales at $30, you would let an ad group spend up
to $90 before turning it off.
● Separating ad groups into device types allows us to look at data
easier and make optimizations quicker. If something isn’t doing well,
we simply turn it off.
ClientAccelerators.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 36 of 43 --

Optimizing Campaigns - Demos
● Check Male Vs. Female first
● Household Income Next - (We run a lot of higher end offers, all
the way up to $50,000 for consulting and one of the first
things we do is shut off the lower 70% of income earners)
● Age - With higher end offers, we usually start around 25+
ClientAccelerators.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 37 of 43 --

How To Scale Budget From $500 A
Day To $50,000 A Day
● Google’s Algorithm is extremely smart, the more data you feed it, the easier it becomes
to scale.
● We bump budgets 20% at a time and see if the CPA holds. Google’s Algorithm takes
some time to regulate new spends, so sometimes you have to wait 48 - 72 hours to see
if it will regulate
● If you have a campaign doing well at $100 a day, you can bump 20% a day, and see
how the CPA holds, if you’ve done it 5 or 6 times, and the CPA has generally stayed the
same, you can get more aggressive.
● You could then go from let’s say $240 a day, to $340 a day, then $500 a day, $750, etc..
ClientAccelerators.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 38 of 43 --

How To Scale Budget From $500 A
Day To $50,000 A Day
● The whole time you’re bumping up budgets, you are going into the demographics
section and turning off ages, income levels, genders, etc.. that aren’t hitting CPA, so the
campaign gets stronger, quicker as you feed more budget into it
● After we find a winning offer and campaigns, we are using Google Analytics to find the
best audiences to try out next.
● We also will drill down into certain demos, so your data may say Males 35 - 44 that are
In-Market for Financial Services is doing very well for you in your broader campaign, so
you would now launch this as a singular campaign.
ClientAccelerators.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 39 of 43 --

How To Scale Budget From $500 A
Day To $50,000 A Day
● Generally we are scaling to these types of spends with 2-3 very strong
creatives
● These creatives are going to be the backbone of all the different
audiences we scale out to (In-Market, Custom Intent, Custom Affinity)
● Our best clients are giving us 4-5 brand new creatives every single week
for YouTube to try, as they know, one really good one could make them
Millions in Sales

How To Scale Budget From $500 A
Day To $50,000 A Day
● YouTube Ads do not fatigue as fast as Facebook does. They can
last for over a year at significant spends. We still have campaigns
going from 2018 with one of our biggest clients
● We do not duplicate campaigns, we add more spend to them, or
